/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wno-comment -Wno-reorder -Wno-unused-variable -Wtype-limits -std=c++14 -fno-strict-aliasing -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -march=native -mfpmath=sse -mavx2 -DLV_HAVE_AVX2 -DLV_HAVE_AVX -DLV_HAVE_SSE -fvisibility=hidden -O3 -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE -Werror -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ldpc_dec_c_test.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ldpc_dec_c_test.dir/ldpc_dec_c_test.c.o -o ldpc_dec_c_test  ../../../libsrsran_phy.a -lpthread -lm /usr/lib64/libfftw3f.so
